TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Marorok, title = Marorok, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marorok} }

S.FORM: Marorok Itiniay i Ruisui Cen no Hualien ko Marorok a niyaro', 267 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 708 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 46% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 328 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 54% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 380 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 38%, Paiwan 2%, Bunun 3%, Truku 2%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: maro~uro~uk itiniaj i ro~u~uiso~u~ui ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u maro~uro~uk a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Marorok Itiniay i Ruisui Cen no Hualien ko Marorok a niyaro', 267 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 708 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 46% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 328 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 54% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 380 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 38%, Paiwan 2%, Bunun 3%, Truku 2%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: maro~uro~uk itiniaj i ro~u~uiso~u~ui ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u maro~uro~uk a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
